title: aegiphila mollis var. puberulenta
intro: Aegiphila mollis var. puberulenta, a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, is a flowering plant that is native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aegiphila mollis var. puberulenta include the ability to reduce fever, ease respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
